response.global_analysis: The audio features a performance of 'パドライアングル・ドリーマー' (Triangle Dreamer) by Fuwa and Moco, followed by a post-performance discussion in English and Japanese. The Reference JSON did not provide lyrics, so I am relying on the on-screen lyrics and the audio waveform for timing and transcription. Subtitles are tightly wrapped to the vocal bursts, with splits for mid-sentence pauses to maintain synchronization and semantic flow.

subtitles.original: 私 悩んじゃいます
subtitles.english: I'm worrying myself over this

subtitles.original: あー、もうすごいヤバイ
subtitles.english: Ah, this is really bad!

subtitles.original: 好きだよ 好きだけど でもそういう意味じゃなくって
subtitles.english: I like her! I do, but not in THAT way!

subtitles.original: だって女の子同士だし
subtitles.english: I mean, we're both girls...

subtitles.original: ねえ神様 どうしたらいいの？
subtitles.english: Oh God, what should I do?

subtitles.original: 私 どうしたいの？
subtitles.english: What do I WANT to do?

subtitles.original: ヘルプミー！
subtitles.english: Help me!

subtitles.original: なんか変だ 愛に国境も年もち性別も関係ない
subtitles.english: It's weird. Love knows no borders, age, or gender.

subtitles.original: けど けど けど
subtitles.english: But, but, but...

subtitles.original: 三角形 三角形の恋はきまぐれ
subtitles.english: Triangle... a triangle love is fickle.

subtitles.original: 一瞬で 一瞬でくずれるバランス
subtitles.english: In a flash, in a flash the balance crumbles.

subtitles.original: 普通の恋 夢みてたのに
subtitles.english: Even though I dreamed of a normal love...

subtitles.original: ノーマル設定のわたしじゃちょっと無理ゲーすぎます
subtitles.english: For my normal settings, this is a bit too much of a 'kusoge'.

subtitles.original: 三角形 三角形の恋は不安定
subtitles.english: Triangle... a triangle love is unstable.

subtitles.original: なんちゃって なんちゃってじゃ済まないカテゴリー
subtitles.english: It's a category that 'just kidding' won't fix.

subtitles.original: 彼女のこと 好きになれたなら
subtitles.english: If only I could fall in love with her...

subtitles.original: なんて妄想しちゃいます 私どかしてます
subtitles.english: I'm having such delusions. Something's wrong with me!

subtitles.original: いくよー！
subtitles.english: Here we go!

subtitles.original: Bau bau! Thank you Ruffians!
subtitles.english: Bau bau! Thank you Ruffians!

subtitles.original: That was so much fun!
subtitles.english: That was so much fun!

subtitles.original: Yeah! Although, I got a bit dizzy though.
subtitles.english: Yeah! Although, I got a bit dizzy though.

subtitles.original: Yeah, from the bubble and then changing so quickly.
subtitles.english: Yeah, from the bubble and then changing so quickly.

subtitles.original: But it was so fun!
subtitles.english: But it was so fun!

subtitles.original: Yeah, you know, the bubble dash was a little bit silly.
subtitles.english: Yeah, you know, the bubble dash was a little bit silly.

subtitles.original: But did we surprise you?
subtitles.english: But did we surprise you?

subtitles.original: And we got to see your smiles even more close up than usual!
subtitles.english: And we got to see your smiles even more close up than usual!

subtitles.original: Wow! Those last two songs we sang were 'Kiss me! Choose me!' together with Alvin...
subtitles.english: Wow! Those last two songs we sang were 'Kiss me! Choose me!' together with Alvin...

subtitles.original: And 'Triangle Dreamer'!
subtitles.english: And 'Triangle Dreamer'!

subtitles.original: With Miki-senpai, Mio-senpai, and Subaru-senpai!
subtitles.english: With Miki-senpai, Mio-senpai, and Subaru-senpai!

subtitles.original: What'd you think, Ruffians?
subtitles.english: What'd you think, Ruffians?

subtitles.original: Kiss me! Choose me! is a song that I've always wanted to sing together with Alvin!
subtitles.english: Kiss me! Choose me! is a song that I've always wanted to sing together with Alvin!

subtitles.original: It's a little bit more sexy... a bit sexy song, right?
subtitles.english: It's a little bit more sexy... a bit sexy song, right?

subtitles.original: Yeah! And 'Triangle Dreamer'! The best of idol songs!
subtitles.english: Yeah! And 'Triangle Dreamer'! The best of idol songs!

subtitles.original: そう、ゆり展開が急すぎて、え、ラフィアンズまだ生きてる？
subtitles.english: Yeah, that yuri development was so sudden. Are you Ruffians still alive?

subtitles.original: え？生きてる？
subtitles.english: Huh? Are you alive?

subtitles.original: Yeah, Bau bau! Our senpai were so cute and wow!
subtitles.english: Yeah, Bau bau! Our senpai were so cute and wow!

subtitles.original: And then crowd surfing at the bubble!
subtitles.english: And then crowd surfing at the bubble!

subtitles.original: It was the best! A lot of firsts this year, right?
subtitles.english: It was the best! A lot of firsts this year, right?

subtitles.original: Yeah! Wow, we have a tiny, tiny announcement!
subtitles.english: Yeah! Wow, we have a tiny, tiny announcement!

subtitles.original: Huh? You know, as FUWAMOCO, it's our birthday, right? Our birthday!
subtitles.english: Huh? You know, as FUWAMOCO, it's our birthday, right? Our birthday!

subtitles.original: And so, we have something we'd like to share with you!
subtitles.english: And so, we have something we'd like to share with you!

subtitles.original: Ready? Okay! One, two...
subtitles.english: Ready? Okay! One, two...

subtitles.original: ドーン！
subtitles.english: Bam!

subtitles.original: It's time to celebrate both of our birthdays...
subtitles.english: It's time to celebrate both of our birthdays...

subtitles.original: ...with our FUWAMOCO 2026 Birthday Merch!
subtitles.english: ...with our FUWAMOCO 2026 Birthday Merch!

subtitles.original: ふわもこの生誕グッズ紹介、始まるよ！
subtitles.english: The introduction for FUWAMOCO's birthday merch starts now!

subtitles.original: First, we became fluffy and fuzzy idols with the Fuwa Fuwa Idol Fuwawa...
subtitles.english: First, we became fluffy and fuzzy idols with the Fuwa Fuwa Idol Fuwawa...

subtitles.original: ...and Moco Moco Idol Mococo acrylic stands! Drawn by our mama, Icomochi-mama!
subtitles.english: ...and Moco Moco Idol Mococo acrylic stands! Drawn by our mama, Icomochi-mama!

subtitles.original: They're rather big compared to regular acrylic stands, so we think they'd be a great addition to your collection!
subtitles.english: They're rather big compared to regular acrylic stands, so we think they'd be a great addition to your collection!

subtitles.original: 大きめサイズで可愛いアイドルのふわもこアクリルスタンド！
subtitles.english: A large-sized, cute idol FUWAMOCO acrylic stand!

subtitles.original: Next, we have the silly Ehehe Angel and Hoeh?! Devil rubber figurines!
subtitles.english: Next, we have the silly Ehehe Angel and Hoeh?! Devil rubber figurines!

subtitles.original: Win-our palm-sized figures, perfect for displaying on your desk!
subtitles.english: Win-our palm-sized figures, perfect for displaying on your desk!

subtitles.original: ハロウィン衣装のふわもこが手のひらサイズのラバーマスコットになったよ！
subtitles.english: FUWAMOCO in Halloween outfits have become palm-sized rubber mascots!

subtitles.original: This one is big!
subtitles.english: This one is big!

subtitles.original: We finally have FUWAMOCO plushies in our Out-and-About casual outfits!
subtitles.english: We finally have FUWAMOCO plushies in our Out-and-About casual outfits!

subtitles.original: But this time, we also speak in your houses!
subtitles.english: But this time, we also speak in your houses!

subtitles.original: It's the Yappy Puppy Fuwawa/Mococo Sounds Plushie!
subtitles.english: It's the Yappy Puppy Fuwawa/Mococo Sounds Plushie!

subtitles.original: They'll be the same size as our Friends with You plushies, so you can display them together!
subtitles.english: They'll be the same size as our Friends with You plushies, so you can display them together!
